📻 the lore

"Tower, this is Beebo. I don't have a callsign. I AM one."
overheard on 118.3, golden hour

Nobody hired Beebo. Nobody trained Beebo. One evening the ramp was a headset short of a body, and Beebo picked it up like it had always been his.

He marshals planes that were never his to marshal. He talks over pilots twice his rank. And somehow, every single flight he waves through lands just fine. The vest doesn't fit right. He wears it anyway.

$SKYKING launched the way Beebo works: uninvited, unlicensed, and already running the show. Native to the chain that just went permissionless. Just like him.
